summary: Iteration 120: Data Integrity Checker feature fully tested. Backend APIs (scan, fix, fix-all) working correctly. Frontend page loads with 'Ready to Scan' placeholder, displays scan results with summary cards (Total/High/Medium/Low), shows issue groups that expand to detailed tables, and Fix All confirmation dialog works. Dashboard regression tests passed - cash/bank breakdown still displays correctly.

success_rate.backend: 100% (11 passed, 2 skipped - skipped because missing_final_amount issues were already fixed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data with known issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Integrity Checker feature fully tested. Initial scan showed 24 issues (8 high - missing_final_amount, 12 medium - payment_mismatch, 4 low - unusual_mode). After running fix-all for missing_final_amount, current state is 16 issues (0 high, 12 medium, 4 low). Payment mismatches require manual review (no auto-fix). Unusual mode can be bulk fixed to change 'card' to 'bank' and remove 'discount' entries.

data_integrity_page.summary_cards: PASSED - Shows Total Issues, High, Medium, Low
data_integrity_page.issue_groups: PASSED - Payment Mismatch (12), Unusual Payment Mode (4)
data_integrity_page.expandable_tables: PASSED - Click group to see detailed issues
data_integrity_page.fix_all_button: PASSED - Shows for fixable issue types

backend_apis.GET_data-integrity_scan: PASSED - Returns summary and issues list
backend_apis.POST_data-integrity_fix-all: PASSED - Bulk fixes by issue type

regression_tests.dashboard_cash_bank_breakdown: PASSED - Cash: SAR 25,643, Bank: SAR 26,100, Online: SAR 6,026
regression_tests.dashboard_expense_categories: PASSED - Shows partner_salary, salary, Supplier Purchase
